steps.title: Read the yearly multiplier
steps.content: The exponent is $\frac{x}{12}$, so after $12$ months the exponent increases by $1$. That means the value is multiplied by $0.27$ each year.

steps.title: Convert retention to decrease
steps.content:
A multiplier of $0.27$ means the machine keeps $27\%$ of its value each year. The percent decrease is:
$$100\%-27\%=73\%$$
The answer is D.
